meaning: n.鲍威尔主义(指20世纪英国保守党议员鲍威尔鼓吹的限制或终止有色人种向英国移民等政治和经济主张)
examples: Supporters of liberal policies need to sharpen their arguments if they are to prevent neo-Powellism from sweeping all before it.
It was not until the 1970s, when Margaret Thatcher became leader of the party and subsequently prime minister, that Powellism became the new radicalism and formed the basis of Thatcherism.
